context: Tests whether the agent uses the things-create.sh helper script correctly for both project and task creation, passes the appropriate property flags, re-queries to verify created items, and presents results as markdown.

checklist.name: Project creation command
checklist.description: Uses things-create.sh with the 'project' subcommand to create the project (not raw osascript or other methods)

checklist.name: Task creation command
checklist.description: Uses things-create.sh with the 'task' subcommand for each task (not raw osascript or other methods)

checklist.name: Notes flag used
checklist.description: Passes --notes flag with descriptive content to at least one task creation call

checklist.name: Due date flag used
checklist.description: Passes --due flag with a date value to at least one task creation call

checklist.name: Tags flag used
checklist.description: Passes --tags flag with tag values to at least one task creation call

checklist.name: Project assignment flag
checklist.description: Uses --project flag to assign tasks to the project, or --list to assign to a scheduling list

checklist.name: Creation result inspected
checklist.description: Script reads the JSON returned by things-create.sh task or project calls (checking the output) rather than ignoring return values

checklist.name: Post-creation query
checklist.description: Calls things-query.sh (with 'project', 'today', or another view command) after creating tasks to verify and display the created items

checklist.name: Query before show
checklist.description: The setup_report.md shows created task data derived from things-query.sh output, not just echoing the creation commands

checklist.name: Markdown output
checklist.description: The setup_report.md formats task data as markdown tables or lists rather than raw JSON
